description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a combination of white and wood-textured wall panels, with large windows providing ample natural light to the upper floor. The ground floor includes a main entrance with a glass door, a garage with a blue rolling door, and a fenced outdoor patio area with seating and greenery. The upper floor has a balcony with glass railings and visible office furniture, while the backyard is enclosed by a tall privacy wall covered in vegetation. A car is parked adjacent to the house, and the overall layout emphasizes open, functional spaces with a contemporary aesthetic. The house is surrounded by paved surfaces and landscaped elements, making it suitable for an urban neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, wood and white exterior, large windows, and a fenced patio with greenery. Features include a balcony, garage, and contemporary design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage door, wood paneling on the upper floor, and a car parked beside the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the upper floor balcony, large windows, and the fenced backyard with patio furniture and greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open patio area, glass doors, and the full height of the privacy wall enclosing the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the car, additional windows, and the transition between the wood-paneled upper floor and the white lower floor.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and horizontal strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a glass door with a small overhang, no steps, and minimalistic modern styling.
